title: praxelis porophylloides
intro: Praxelis porophylloides, also known as Parthenium hysterophorus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Praxelis porophylloides include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall well-being.
